name: ordering_inversion_different_deny
description: Rule has per_tx_cap first (1000 XLM), then per_period_cap (5000 XLM/day). Prior spend = 4900 XLM. tx = 1500 XLM: exceeds both per_tx_cap AND would exceed per_period_cap. per_tx_cap is evaluated first and fires. Expect PerTxCapExceeded (not PerPeriodCapExceeded), demonstrating ordering determines which reason surfaces.
